description: Registry of Google Sheets tabs for automatic fetch/refresh. When the user says 'fetch', 'refresh', 'grab', or 'access' data, use entries from this registry instead of requiring pasted URLs.
requirements: Each sheet must be shared as 'Anyone with the link can view' for curl export to work.

tabs.name: Budget Aprobado

tabs.name: Raw Data -- Actuals
tabs.notes: Gross/Net ASP, New Client MRR, Upsell, Cross Sell, BoP MRR, Churn, Discounts

tabs.name: ASP Forecast 2026 & Actual
tabs.notes: Item Ticket Promedio, New Product/Upsell/Cross sell ARS by month, REAL

tabs.name: % Funnel_Lead_Product_All_ICP
tabs.notes: Lead % Conv, CQL % Conv, conversion rates by product

tabs.name: Products_Sold Forecast 2026
